data.title: 4chan rises from the dead: How the imageboard moves crypto markets
data.description:
After 4chan was hacked on April 14 and vast troves of user and moderator data were leaked online, the controversial website quickly went down, and many believed it would never recover. However, less than two weeks later, the imageboard was back online, defiant as ever. “4chan is back,” an official blog post proclaimed. “No other website can replace it, or this community
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/4chan-rises-from-the-dead-how-the-imageboard-moves-crypto-markets?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: India and Pakistan Agree to Comprehensive Ceasefire
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, India and Pakistan have reached an agreement on a comprehensive ceasefire that takes effect immediately. The Pakistani Foreign Minister emphasized the country's commitment to regional peace and security without compromising sovereignty and territorial integrity. This agreement marks a full ceasefire between the two nations, with military communication channels and hotlines now operational.

The Pakistan Civil Aviation Authority announced that the country's airspace has been fully reopened for all flights.

The Indian Ministry of External Affairs stated that the ceasefire will commence at 17:00 Indian Standard Time on Saturday. The Chief of Military Operations of Pakistan made a call on Saturday afternoon, during which both sides agreed to halt all firing. The military chiefs of India and Pakistan are scheduled to hold further talks on May 12.

data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said, "After a long night of negotiations mediated by the United States, I am pleased to announce that India and Pakistan have agreed to a comprehensive and immediate ceasefire. data.title: Wells Fargo Raises Price Target on Billion-Dollar Company, Forecasts Firm’s Stock Will Soar by 52%: Report
data.description:
Wells Fargo is updating its outlook on Uber (UBER), reportedly forecasting an explosive share price for the $173 billion ride-hailing company. In a new note to clients, Wells Fargo’s Ken Gawrelski and other analysts raise Uber’s price target to $100 from $90 and reiterate an overweight rating, reports Barron’s.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/10/wells-fargo-raises-price-target-on-173000000000-company-predicts-the-firms-stock-could-soar-by-52-report/

data.title: Crypto Market May Enter Altcoin Season Soon, Analysts Explains Why
data.description:
The altcoin crypto market cap is holding strong above $700 billion. It signaled sustained investor confidence across broader segments of the crypto market. In recent months, a steady accumulation level between $600-$700 billion was observed for the entire crypto market capitalization except for Bitcoin and Ethereum
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/10/crypto-market-may-enter-altcoin-season-soon-analysts-explains-why/

data.title: Ethereum's Pectra Upgrade Spurs Significant Gains Amid Market Shifts
data.description:
According to PANews, Ethereum's successful Pectra upgrade has led to a notable increase in its value, with ETH experiencing a weekly surge of over 30%. Other altcoins such as SOL, ADA, XRP, and BNB have also seen gains ranging from 2% to 6%.

Nick Ruck, head of LVRG Research, noted that traders are optimistic about the cryptocurrency sector potentially finding a new opportunity to hedge against market uncertainties. Investors are shifting their perspectives on cryptocurrencies as altcoins move away from negative trends, sparking renewed risk appetite and buying pressure.

Despite the positive momentum, traders remain vigilant regarding the upcoming U.S.-China trade talks, set to commence late Saturday in Switzerland. Any signs of a stalemate or escalating tensions could potentially dampen the current upward trend in the crypto market.
